title: Google AI Studio 长期目标：消除 AI 构建摩擦
full_text:
Logan Kilpatrick on X: "Our long term goal for @GoogleAIStudio is to eliminate the friction to build with AI, then do the same for your own business, and ultimately unlock economic opportunity for everyone.
Feels like early innings but I keep getting more excited about this." / X

discovery_record.discovery_summary: 我们为 @GoogleAIStudio 设定的长期目标是消除使用 AI 构建的摩擦，然后为你的企业做同样的事，并最终为每个人释放经济机会。 感觉还只是早期阶段，但我对此越来越兴奋。
